products.name: LEO100 GNSS SDR
products.descriptor: Production-ready turnkey software-defined GNSS receiver for precision navigation

evidence.snippet:
LEO100 GNSS SDR
Production-ready software-defined GNSS receiver for advanced positioning applications.
Locus Lock’s GNSS-SDR Platform Joins Defense Innovation Unit’s Blue UAS Framework Cleared List

products.name: RTK Software Engine
products.descriptor: Optional RTK software add-on for centimeter-level GNSS positioning without hardware changes

evidence.snippet: Carrier-phase-based positioning enables high-precision performance, with an optional RTK software engine available for even higher accuracy without hardware changes.

products.name: Software-Only Solutions
products.descriptor: GNSS software capabilities deployable on existing customer hardware stacks

evidence.snippet:
Software-defined GNSS solutions delivered entirely in software, built for existing systems.
​
Advanced capabilities deployed on your current hardware stack. Contact us to discuss integration.
[Contact Us](https://www.locuslock.com/contact-us)
Software-Only Solutions,
Built for Your Systems

unresolved_questions: RTK Software Engine readiness, NDAA, and Blue UAS status are unknown — the corpus only mentions it in passing as an optional add-on (resource-0003 line 49) with no ordering or compliance language specific to this component.
Software-Only Solutions has no specific NDAA or Blue UAS claim in the corpus; the Blue UAS/NDAA certifications cited in resource-0006 reference the LEO100 platform specifically.

The LEO100 datasheet PDF (https://www.locuslock.com/_files/ugd/2dc480_c523f9fea0ad478da5ca5473aa191f51.pdf) was not fetched; it may contain detailed specs and compliance details for all three products.

fetch_requests.reason: LEO100 datasheet PDF linked from the product page — would confirm specs, readiness, and any per-product NDAA/Blue UAS claims for LEO100, RTK Software Engine, and Software-Only Solutions.
FAQ page may clarify product differences between LEO100 hardware, RTK Software Engine, and Software-Only Solutions, including readiness and ordering details.
Alternate product URL linked from Blue UAS news post — may be a distinct or more detailed LEO100 product page with additional compliance and readiness evidence.
